stdout: {"actual_usd":0.09902,"completion_tokens":70,"finish_reason":"stop","group_chat_id":"d807e381-cf25-46e5-8e97-0d5e8b1ce116","model":"gpt-5.4","orchestrator_changed_reply":false,"prompt_tokens":19594,"reply":"\"Dangerous request.\" *I scratch at my beard and watch the fountain kick light across the stones for a second.* \"I could say something about how you make a room feel less defended before I— ...anyway, the practical sentence is this: that loose board by the west bridge will catch a heel if nobody fixes it.\"","reply_post_orchestrator":"\"Dangerous request.\" *I scratch at my beard and watch the fountain kick light across the stones for a second.* \"I could say something about how you make a room feel less defended before I— ...anyway, the practical sentence is this: that loose board by the west bridge will catch a heel if nobody fixes it.\"","rolling_24h_usd":16.426369999999995,"run_id":"90da2faa-b8e3-4b46-b04d-2818fec15f1f","speaker_id":"ddc3085e-0549-4e1f-a7b6-0894aa8180c6","speaker_name":"Darren"}
